parameters: We went through all that to get this entry emblem. We can't leave
without at least trying it out.
Hey, hey, ho! Hey, hey, ho!
Those darn demons! Takin' over the country and settin' limits on
how much loggin' we can do!
We've always logged as much as we wanted to! Well, at least they
Magical organisms are a pain, aren't they? You can't do any
damage no matter how hard you smack 'em.
They're really weak to elemental damage, though. Try usin' magic
or weapons with an elemental attribute.
